evidence: "This is a great kids movie. The animation is wonderful, the story is heartwarming and their are some very nice messages about social responsibilities..."
"I've always liked John Goodman and this show really hits on the hilarity in today's politics..."
"As a long time Star Trek fan I enjoyed this but not as much previous movies. The big screen movies seem to go from borrowing heavily from earlier TV plots to some that are really imaginative..."
"This movie is one of the funniest I've seen. It gets a little crude at times but the laughs are undeniable!"
"Kate Winslet never disappoints and Josh Brolin did a good job..."
"Lots of action and great special effects but the plot wasn't given as much attention..."
"The story is heartwarming and their are some very nice messages about social responsibilities..."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly and comedic films, often appreciating heartwarming stories with positive messages. They show a preference for fast-paced narratives and are less concerned with production quality, indicating a focus on entertainment value.
